testcase.name: shouldNotCalculateNetRevenuePerTransactionWhenTrxnCountIsZero
testcase.system-out: 2025-02-18T14:16:12.790-06:00 WARN 19940 --- [deal-desk-service] [ main] org.jeasy.rules.core.RuleProxy : Rule 'com.aciworldwide.dealdesk.rules.impl.ProfitabilityRules$CalculateGrossRevenue' has been evaluated to false due to a declared but missing fact 'settledPmtAmt' in [Fact{name='netRevenue', value=1000.0},Fact{name='nrPerTrans', value=[D@63513c1c},Fact{name='trxnCount', value=0}] 2025-02-18T14:16:12.791-06:00 WARN 19940 --- [deal-desk-service] [ main] org.jeasy.rules.core.RuleProxy : Rule 'com.aciworldwide.dealdesk.rules.impl.ProfitabilityRules$CalculateMarginPercentage' has been evaluated to false due to a declared but missing fact 'grossRevenue' in [Fact{name='netRevenue', value=1000.0},Fact{name='nrPerTrans', value=[D@63513c1c},Fact{name='trxnCount', value=0}] 2025-02-18T14:16:12.794-06:00 WARN 19940 --- [deal-desk-service] [ main] org.jeasy.rules.core.RuleProxy : Rule 'com.aciworldwide.dealdesk.rules.impl.ProfitabilityRules$CalculateUpliftDecrease' has been evaluated to false due to a declared but missing fact 'netRevenueCard' in [Fact{name='netRevenue', value=1000.0},Fact{name='nrPerTrans', value=[D@63513c1c},Fact{name='trxnCount', value=0}]

testcase.name: shouldCalculateUpliftDecreaseWithZeroACHRevenue
testcase.system-out: 2025-02-18T14:16:12.830-06:00 WARN 19940 --- [deal-desk-service] [ main] org.jeasy.rules.core.RuleProxy : Rule 'com.aciworldwide.dealdesk.rules.impl.ProfitabilityRules$CalculateGrossRevenue' has been evaluated to false due to a declared but missing fact 'settledPmtAmt' in [Fact{name='netRevenueCard', value=1000.0},Fact{name='netRevenueACH', value=0.0},Fact{name='upliftDecrease', value=[D@1da53092}] 2025-02-18T14:16:12.830-06:00 WARN 19940 --- [deal-desk-service] [ main] org.jeasy.rules.core.RuleProxy : Rule 'com.aciworldwide.dealdesk.rules.impl.ProfitabilityRules$CalculateMarginPercentage' has been evaluated to false due to a declared but missing fact 'grossRevenue' in [Fact{name='netRevenueCard', value=1000.0},Fact{name='netRevenueACH', value=0.0},Fact{name='upliftDecrease', value=[D@1da53092}] 2025-02-18T14:16:12.830-06:00 WARN 19940 --- [deal-desk-service] [ main] org.jeasy.rules.core.RuleProxy : Rule 'com.aciworldwide.dealdesk.rules.impl.ProfitabilityRules$CalculateNetRevenuePerTransaction' has been evaluated to false due to a declared but missing fact 'netRevenue' in [Fact{name='netRevenueCard', value=1000.0},Fact{name='netRevenueACH', value=0.0},Fact{name='upliftDecrease', value=[D@1da53092}]
